Document:
# Rule D2: PvP Zones
- Vaults and Caches that spawn in with an automated No Fly Zone announced around them are PvP Zones. - A PvP zone does not mean you can immediately initiate killing upon entering into the No Fly Zone, but that there are looser restrictions on Escalation and Roleplay requirements. - You are not required to get medical help for those that you fight within the PvP Zones, but you are not to block off or attack Medical coming to aid them. - If you are defeated in a PvP zone and taken out of it for recovery by Medical or your crew, you are not to re-enter and keep fighting.
